_about: Machine-readable twin of /humans. For live counts and CIDs always prefer /v1/agent_card and /v1/manifests; the snapshot fields below are seeded at static-asset publish time and drift between deploys.

manifests._live_pointer: GET /v1/manifests returns the authoritative current CIDs

counts._live_pointer: GET /v1/agent_card for the live snapshot; numbers below are publish-time only

foundation_encoders._purpose: Four GPU encoders co-resident on a 20 GB VRAM budget; surfaced as their own bands AND woven into algorithm consensus voting.

jepa_v2_dynamics.status: untrained_baseline; short-circuits to last-attested vintage; receipt carries `untrained_baseline` warning

consensus_algorithms._purpose: The triple-consensus pattern — three encoders with independent receptive-field aliasing vote on a change index. Consensus across all three is signal; one-or-none is receptive-field artifact.
consensus_algorithms.deforestation: deforestation_triple@1 — Hansen GFC mask uplift to `hansen_confirmed` verdict, gate=0.20
consensus_algorithms.wetland_change: wetland_change_triple@1 — Tessera leg substituted by JRC GSW recurrence delta, gate=0.10
consensus_algorithms.urban_expansion: urban_expansion_triple@1 — Overture buildings delta + s2.B11 SWIR corroboration, gate=0.20
consensus_algorithms.disaster_anomaly: disaster_anomaly_triple@1 — spatial (no temporal recipe), 2-σ neighbour z-score gate
consensus_algorithms.climate_archetype: climate_archetype_triple@1 — 12-class Köppen-Geiger classifier with type-locality centroids
consensus_algorithms.coastal_erosion: coastal_erosion_triple@1 — bathymetry-clamped to active-coastline cells (-5m ≤ depth ≤ +5m)

ask_intents._purpose: When /v1/ask classifies the question via keyword pre-pass, the response carries a `foundation_embeddings` envelope with per-encoder neighbour lists and cross-encoder consensus voting. Additive — non-matching questions keep the topic-router scalar response.

views.field: Cells-as-stars constellation (canvas, lat/lng or embedding PCA).
views.graph: Ontology SVG: Source -> Materializer -> Cell x Band x Tslot -> Fact -> Receipt. Click any node to open the try-it drawer for the relevant primitive.
views.registry: Manifest cards (registry, bands, algorithms, sources, schema, topics, lcv-1, alphabet) with counts, CIDs, and try-it buttons.
views.log: Latest signed attestations, top-of-list, with one-click in-browser verify.

features: pre-filled JSON body seeded from real corpus data
in-browser ed25519 verify of returned receipts
copy as curl / python (httpx) / MCP tools/call envelope

verify_page.purpose: Reconstruct the canonical preimage, run ed25519 against the responder pubkey, surface green/red verdict — entirely in-browser via @noble/curves + @noble/hashes.
verify_page.fallback: POST /v1/verify_receipt if the CDN imports time out

ui_surfaces.agent_eye_view: Every right-pane card carries a `human` / `raw` toggle that flips the rendered card to the raw JSON envelope an MCP-driven agent would receive.

trust_model.signed_absence: When a band has no data at a cell, the responder returns a signed Absence fact with a typed reason (`unavailable_capability`, `outside_coverage`, `gpu_unavailable`, `archetype_seed_unavailable`, ...). The Absence itself is citable.

algorithm_provenance._purpose: Every algorithm in the registry carries a `parameters` block (typed tunable thresholds) and a `learned_from` block (citation provenance for every tuned number). An auditor can trace any gate threshold back to its referee.
algorithm_provenance.example: GET /v1/algorithms/clay_prithvi_tessera_triple_consensus@1 returns parameters.consensus_threshold=0.15 with learned_from citing Healey et al. 2018 RSE 204:717-728 (LandTrendr ensemble heuristic).
algorithm_provenance.tunable_in_deployment: Operators may publish a distinct algorithms manifest CID with re-tuned parameters; the consensus_threshold (and similar) are read at registry-load time, not hardcoded in the formula string.
